Text.Page:
Someone or something infiltrated the garrison in the night. Only powerful sorcery could have allowed enemies to approach undetected.

We have a device that scans the area for residual energy—there is always some left behind when spells are cast.

The device activated this morning. Will retrieve the sensor containing the results of the scan?

Ah, is as reliable as they say.

This one will examine the results.Give her the scan results.
Oh my...argon energy! This feeds the suspicion that Thulsa and the argons are collaborating.
